growth_records.medium: Peptone cellulose solution (PCS) medium with CMC

up.method: experimentally measured glucose uptake rate vs dry cell biomass; used to constrain GEM; numeric value reported in Table S5 (supplementary, not in main text)

growth_records.cite: Kundu, Pritam et al. Genome-Scale Community Model-Guided Development of Bacterial Coculture for Lignocellulose Bioconversion. Biotechnology and Bioengineering (2025). DOI:10.1002/bit.28918. [PMC11895418]
growth_records.snippet: P6 Niallia circulans P6 ... Experimental growth rate Mean 0.126 SD 0.0068
growth_records.notes: Table 1: experimental growth rate (h^-1) mean=0.126 SD=0.0068 for Niallia circulans P6; in-silico FBA growth rate=0.113 h^-1. Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.126=5.501 h. Aerobic batch shake-flask in PCS medium (0.5% peptone, 0.5% NaCl, 0.1% yeast extract, 0.15% CaCO3, 0.5% cellulosic material), pH 7.2, 37C, 120 rpm, 72 h. Glucose uptake rate measured experimentally per strain to constrain models (Table S5) but numeric value not in main text. Strain isolated from wood-feeding termite gut.

phenotypes.base_medium: Acid/gas-production test: peptone/complex base + substrate + pH indicator — positive = fermentative acid production, NOT growth on the substrate as a sole carbon source (interpret with care for model validation)
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 642 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/642
